subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy most lucid letter was received, and from its contents sweet significances were derived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان کتاب مبین قرین اطلاع گردید از مضامین معانی دلنشین استنباط شد
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @unity; oneness of humanity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
